question: What is the name of the album by The Police that won a Grammy award as well as a Juno award?
sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?album ?albumLabel WHERE {
  ?album wdt:P31 wd:Q482994 ; wdt:P175 wd:Q178095 ; wdt:P166 ?award1 ; wdt:P166 ?award2 .
  ?award1 rdfs:label ?label1 .
  ?award2 rdfs:label ?label2 .
  ?album rdfs:label ?albumLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?albumLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?label1) = "en" && LANG(?label2) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label1) , "grammy") && CONTAINS(LCASE(?label2) , "juno"))
  FILTER(?award1 != ?award2)
}

  wd:Q18656 p:P5995 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P5995 ?supplier .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
    ?start rdfs:label ?startLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?startLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
    ?end rdfs:label ?endLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?endLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
  ?supplier rdfs:label ?supplierLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?supplierLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?supplierLabel) , "adidas"))
}
GROUP BY ?supplier
